checks.statement: Collapse transition probe traces should keep firstChildToDetailDeltaY inside the lockstep envelope across transitionSeq ticks.
checks.objective: Discriminate whether seam drift originates from transition ordering drift versus static layout constants.
required_inputs: displayLink probe logs containing transitionSeq and firstChildToDetailDeltaY
procedure_steps: Collect one collapse run trace with transitionSeq, firstChildToDetailDeltaY, and detailVisibleHeight per probe tick.
Partition trace by collapse phases (start, transition, end) and compute max absolute delta from expected envelope.
Mark anomaly if any contiguous transition segment exits the envelope before collapse_end.
expected_signals: firstChildToDetailDeltaY remains within expected envelope at each phase
collapse_end leaves no residual seam delta
failure_signals: delta spike appears while transitionSeq is monotonic
delta exits envelope before ownership settles
evidence_outputs: annotated witness candidate statement for any envelope breach

checks.statement: Selected collection key should match runtimeCollection and ruleCollection at the first queue lookup for accepted queue-preview slice.
checks.objective: Kill or confirm the lookup-key drift hypothesis for queue preview mismatch under aligned UI selection.
procedure_steps: Capture one deterministic selection->lookup sequence for a known collection from the fixture.
Extract the first lookup tuple (screenCollection, runtimeCollection, ruleCollection, lookupHit).
Classify as kill if all keys agree with lookupHit=true, otherwise classify as pressure evidence with explicit mismatch tuple.
expected_signals: lookupHit is true for the selected key
evidence_outputs: witness statement capturing any first divergence
